state.next-action:
Phase 38 shipped (2026-04-12): skill candidates auto-drafted from high-pressure phases. Phase 35 runtime telemetry foundation shipped (2026-04-12): trace schema v5 now stamps runtime identity into raw hook events, CLI logs, and TRACE scaffolds for Claude Code vs Codex attribution. Canonical repo-root skills/ source shipped (2026-04-12): command-backed gad-* skills and workspace skills now compile from one tree, with runtime install/transpilation sourced from skills/. Phase 35-03 shipped (2026-04-12): /planning, per-run eval pages, and landing/playable panels now surface runtime attribution plus eval timing metadata. `gad eval run` also auto-ensures runtime installs for supported agents before scaffolding new runs.
=== SHIPPED === - Restored shared model-profile resolution with default off semantics and workflow model emission in gad-tools init - Claude SDK sessions now use live-safe Claude aliases (sonnet / haiku / opus) instead of stale frozen model IDs - Added an opt-in live integration test for real model switching plus one-shot manual verification via SessionInit events - compute-self-eval.mjs now auto-drafts SKILL.md candidates for every high-pressure phase - 12 candidates landed in skills/candidates/ (phase-10, 12, 13, 14, 14.5, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 30, 34) - Candidates have status: candidate, category: System, origin: auto-drafted in frontmatter - Canonical skills now live at repo-root skills/ with COMMAND.md + skill.json for command-backed gad-* skills - gad install all --claude/--codex now installs from canonical skills/ and transpiles into runtime-native layouts - build-site-data.mjs, release support, and release-surface gating now read skills/ as the authored source of truth - gad-trace-hook now emits runtime metadata on each event; gad CLI logs now stamp runtime identity; TRACE scaffolds/from-log preserve runtime_identity
=== DECISIONS === GAD-D-144: Skill candidates quarantine and review workflow GAD-D-146: Claude-facing model profiles use aliases and stay off by default
=== NEXT === 1. Phase 40 (site structure): 40-01/40-02 shipped (skills tab split + shadcn Input/Button; Planning System tab split). Next: grep for remaining multi-component pages (glossary, emergent, freedom, contribute) or close phase 40 when backlog empty. 2. Review upstream get-shit-done commits 596ce2d and 002bcf2 against the SDK/worktree roadmap 3. Execute phase 36 (per-eval repos + command split) 4. Manually review 12 candidates on the site and decide: promote, merge, or discard 5. Decide whether to backfill runtime identity into historically preserved eval traces or leave them as pre-contract runs 6. After naming cleanup stabilizes, review the inherited GSD SDK design and deferred workstream concept before reintroducing any workstream feature 7. Keep `.tmp/get-shit-done` current and continue capturing upstream comparison notes before adopting workstreams, security, SDK, or README ideas
=== SELF-EVAL (latest) === 3,517 events | 198 tasks (191 done) | 143 decisions Framework overhead: 23.6% | Loop compliance: 80% Skill candidates: 12
